title: Total Pet Training Lead for Dogs, Waterproof Long Line for Recall & Obedience Training - Extra Long Dog Lead - Suitable for all Sized Dogs (10m, Regular Clip)
features: Long Line for Recall & Distance Training – The Total Pet training lead for dogs is perfect to work on training recall and other commands at distance. Also, if your dog is reactive, this lead is ideal to give ‘off the lead’ freedom while still being in control.

Have Control of Your Dog & Prevent Hand Burns – Unlike other long lines, ours comes with a control handle which acts like a break allowing you to gradually slow your dog down. The control handle also prevents nasty hand burns if you need to grab the lead suddenly.

Ideal For Dogs That Love Water & Mud – The lead has a waterproof coating making it ideal if your dog likes a swim! The lead floats & furthermore, because its waterproof the lead can be easily cleaned and doesn’t retain dirt & smells unlike others.

Suitable For All Dogs from Great Dane to Shih Tzu – The lead is 1.75cm wide which makes it super light to carry for even the smallest dogs but nylon running throughout also ensures its super strong! Clips used can withstand 250kg of pulling force & triple stitching patterns secure all joins.
Storage Bag (Included) – The Total Pet long line training lead comes with 1 x control handle & drawstring bag for storage.
